name: arcus
description: ARCUS (Any Repository Can Use Spec-driven development) — Marketplace for Spec Driven Development tools and skills compatible with GitHub Copilot, Claude Code, and VS Code.

plugins.name: arcus-plugin
plugins.description: Spec → Code + Pull Request pipeline plus a one-shot repository agentifier. Bundles orchestrator skills (arcus-controller, repo-agentifier), their supporting skills and dispatched agents (skills/ vs agents/ surfaces), helper scripts, and a session bootstrap hook.
